title: Heartsease
content:
There is a flower I wish to wear,
But not until first worn by you,
Heartsease of all earth�s flowers most rare;
Bring it; and bring enough for two.
meaning:
"Heartsease" is a quintessential example of Walter Savage Landor's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
